title: エアシャカールのダービー

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Today is... the day of a very important
race!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Let's go to Tokyo Racecourse. I'll bring my flag to
cheer aloooong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Japanese Derby. After winning the
Satsuki Sho, Air Shakur is one victory away from
earning a Double Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going off the pre-race takes, she's today's
overwhelming favorite. Everyone believes her
chances at winning are high, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Seven centimeters...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Shakur has been saying that a lot recently, like
she's in a trance. "Seven more centimeters, seven
centimeters..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seven centimeters... I can't say I understand it.
Amid all the tension, the race kicks off to a start.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're entering the final stretch! Air Shakur has
taken the lead, but the pack is right on her tail!
It's anyone's game now!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they're past the finish line! What a close call!
Has Air Shakur managed to hold out, or will her
chaser have their dreams realized?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a while to have the footage assessed. But
once a decision appears made...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: U-um, Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Today was, you know... a really close one...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, you know what I think, Shakur! You'll
definitely... I mean, definitely...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. I told you this already.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You've been hearing me say it—seven
centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I knew the answer from the start. No matter what I
plugged into the equations, it always fell short.
Seven centimeters between me and the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I didn't wanna give up, but look how things
turned out. Numbers will be numbers. What crap...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Numbers... Shakur, did you—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I read the numbers. Who do you think I am? I'm not upset. I've been prepared for this.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But despite it all, I'm still a nose length short.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: This is how my first attempt ends. Now...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's your turn, Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? It's m-my turn?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As your roommate, I've been forced to accept
that your numbers are all over the place. They're
nowhere near as consistent as mine.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But maybe, if you remember what I told you
about manipulating variables... you might have a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Shakur... Up until now, you've shared so much
with me...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch. Don't get it twisted.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just... want the Three Goddesses to take a
chance on you. Nothing else.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It still won't be easy. How do you plan to press
forward? How are you gonna handle the
numbers?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Guts and knowledge alone won't cut it. If my
equations are correct, you'll...
